front: What is a depot formulation and how does it release peptides?
back: Depot formulations provide sustained peptide release over days-weeks-months. Types: 1) Microspheres (PLGA encapsulation, biodegradable), 2) Implants (non-biodegradable, removable), 3) In-situ forming depots (PLGA in NMP), 4) Lipid nanoparticles, 5) Hydrogels. Release: diffusion + erosion + degradation.
